findings.summary: NMOS transistor circuit with gate resistor correctly detected for AOT2618 high-side switch
findings.details: The transistor_circuits section correctly identifies Q1 (AOT2618, NMOS) with drain on VDD, source driving output connectors, gate_resistors=[R1 10k], and drain_is_power=true. The 49.9Ω source resistors (R2, R3, R4) for current-sharing and the large 1mF bulk capacitors (C1, C3) are present in the BOM. The RC filter detection correctly identifies the gate RC filter (R1=10k, C6+C4=2µF in parallel, fc=7.96 Hz).
